'''Achillea''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located within the [[Cadriaan Province]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It was a tradeworld on the [[Shapani Bypass]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|route]] and was one of [[House Cadriaan]]'s primary worlds.

==History==
Discovered during the [[Twelve Kingdoms Era]], Achillea joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] after several centuries during the [[Tapani sector#Federal Era (1,581-32 BBY)|Federal Era]]. The sector was represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Rodd]] of [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Geography==
The planet boasted shallow, warm seas and three large land masses; Achillea's urban centers were located on the northernmost continent. The [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]], [[Cadriell]], was situated on a peninsula on the west coast, where it was surrounded by spectacular cliffs that overlooked the [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]].

Achillea's small southern continent hosted huge [[spacia tree]] plantations which were farmed for spacia wood that was made into furniture. Manufactured on Achillea, such furniture was in great demand throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
